name: Amiyaki Tei Co., Ltd.
summary: Amiyaki Tei Co., Ltd. operates a chain of restaurants in Japan. It operates through Yakiniku, Yakitori, and Other segments. The Yakiniku segment operates 182 restaurants under the Amiyaki Tei, Karbiya, and Suehiro Kan brand names, which specializes in offering meat. The Yakitori segment operates 55 restaurants under the Ganso Yakitoriya brand, which offers yakitori and kamomeki. The Other segment operates 32 restaurants. Amiyaki Tei Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Kasugai, Japan.
